translations.it: La mia salute sta bene oggi.
translations.vi: Sức khỏe của tôi hôm nay ổn.
translations.el: Η υγεία μου είναι καλά σήμερα.
translations.nb: Helsen min er bra i dag.
translations.sv: Min hälsa är bra i dag.
translations.cs: Moje zdraví je dnes v pořádku.
translations.da: Mit helbred er godt i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は体調がいいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun 'salud'; agrees in person/number with the possessor.
Common noun, feminine singular, head of the noun phrase.
Finite form of the copular auxiliary verb 'estar' used to express a state.
Adverb modifying the predicate; expresses manner/state.
Temporal noun/adverbial word functioning as an adverbial of time in the sentence.

sentences.target: Cuida tu salud todos los días.

translations.es: Cuida tu salud todos los días.
translations.en: Take care of your health every day.
translations.fr: Prends soin de ta santé tous les jours.
translations.de: Achte jeden Tag auf deine Gesundheit.
translations.it: Prenditi cura della tua salute ogni giorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 每天都要照顾好你的健康。
translations.yue: 每日都要好好照顧自己嘅健康。
translations.ru: Заботьтесь о своём здоровье каждый день.
translations.pt: Cuide da sua saúde todos os dias.
translations.he: שמור על הבריאות שלך כל יום.
translations.vi: Hãy chăm sóc sức khỏe của bạn mỗi ngày.
translations.nl: Zorg elke dag goed voor je gezondheid.
translations.hi: हर दिन अपनी सेहत का ध्यान रखो।
translations.pl: Dbaj o swoje zdrowie każdego dnia.
translations.el: Φρόντιζε την υγεία σου κάθε μέρα.
translations.nb: Ta vare på helsen din hver dag.
translations.sv: Ta hand om din hälsa varje dag.
translations.ro: Ai grijă de sănătatea ta în fiecare zi.
translations.cs: Pečuj o své zdraví každý den.
translations.da: Pas på dit helbred hver dag.
translations.ja: 毎日、自分の健康に気をつけてください。

tokens.explanation: Finite imperative form of the verb; main predicate of the sentence.
Possessive determiner modifying 'salud'; indicates second-person possession.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object of the imperative verb.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'días'; agrees in gender and number.
Definite article modifying 'días'; masculine plural form.
Common noun, masculine plural, part of the temporal phrase 'todos los días'.

translations.it: La salute di Ana sta migliorando.
translations.pt: A saúde de Ana está melhorando.
translations.vi: Sức khỏe của Ana đang khá hơn.
translations.hi: आना की सेहत में सुधार हो रहा है।
translations.ja: アナの体調が良くなっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article introducing and agreeing with 'salud'.
Common noun, feminine singular, head of the subject noun phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement 'Ana' and linking it to 'salud'.
Proper noun, referring to a person; functions as the complement of the preposition.
Finite present-tense verb, third person singular; predicate of the clause.

sentences.target: Voy al médico por mi salud.

translations.es: Voy al médico por mi salud.
translations.en: I'm going to the doctor for my health.
translations.fr: Je vais chez le médecin pour ma santé.
translations.de: Ich gehe wegen meiner Gesundheit zum Arzt.
translations.it: Vado dal medico per la mia salute.
translations.zh-Hans: 我因为健康问题去看医生。
translations.yue: 我因為健康問題去睇醫生。
translations.ru: Я иду к врачу из-за своего здоровья.
translations.pt: Vou ao médico pela minha saúde.
translations.he: אני הולך לרופא בגלל הבריאות שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đi gặp bác sĩ vì sức khỏe của mình.
translations.ar: أنا ذاهب إلى الطبيب بسبب صحتي.
translations.nl: Ik ga voor mijn gezondheid naar de dokter.
translations.uk: Я йду до лікаря через своє здоров’я.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी सेहत के लिए डॉक्टर के पास जा रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Idę do lekarza z powodu mojego zdrowia.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω στον γιατρό για την υγεία μου.
translations.nb: Jeg går til legen for helsens skyld.
translations.id: Saya pergi ke dokter untuk kesehatan saya.
translations.sv: Jag går till läkaren för min hälsas skull.
translations.ro: Merg la doctor pentru sănătatea mea.
translations.cs: Jdu k lékaři kvůli svému zdraví.
translations.da: Jeg går til lægen for mit helbreds skyld.
translations.ja: 健康のために病院へ行きます。

tokens.explanation: Finite present-tense verb, first person singular; main predicate.

Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'a' in the contracted form 'al'.
Preposition introducing the reason/cause phrase.
Possessive determiner modifying 'salud'.
Common noun, feminine singular, object of the preposition 'por'.
